title: salvia japonica var. filicifolia
intro: Salvia japonica var. filicifolia, also known as Japanese sage, is a plant species in the mint family that is native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salvia japonica var. filicifolia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting respiratory health. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
